parameters.content:
## 📋 Job Application Processor

### What this workflow does
1. Watches Gmail for job applications
2. Downloads resume attachments
3. Extracts candidate info from resume
4. Scores based on experience & skills
5. Logs to ATS spreadsheet
6. Sends auto-reply to candidate
7. Notifies HR team via Slack

### Setup steps
1. Connect Gmail OAuth2 credentials
2. Get PDF Vector API key from pdfvector.com/api-keys
3. Create Google Sheet with columns below
4. Connect Slack and pick your HR channel
5. Update required skills in Score Candidate node

### Sheet columns
Name, Email, Phone, Location, Current Title, Years Experience, Score, Status, Skills, Skills Matched, Application Date, Processed Date

### Perfect for
- HR teams
- Recruiters
- Small businesses

## 🎯 Scoring Logic

- Experience: 40 points
- Education: 30 points
- Skills match: 30 points

### Status
- 75+ → Schedule Interview
- 50-74 → Review Further
- <50 → Pass

Edit required skills in the
Score Candidate node.

parameters.prompt: Extract candidate resume data as flat fields. fullName, email, phone, location (city and state), linkedIn, yearsOfExperience (number), currentTitle, mostRecentCompany, secondMostRecentCompany, highestDegree (e.g. Bachelor, Master, PhD, Other), educationField, educationInstitution, technicalSkillsList (comma-separated technical skills as single string), softSkillsList (comma-separated soft skills as single string), certificationsList (comma-separated certifications as single string), languagesList (comma-separated languages as single string), keyAchievements (semicolon-separated top 3 achievements as single string).

parameters.subject: Thank you for your application
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $('Score Candidate').item.json.fullName }},

Thank you for your interest in joining our team. We have received your application and our team is currently reviewing it.

We will be in touch within the next few business days regarding next steps.

Best regards,
The Hiring Team
